body: PARKED: [tool_surface_incomplete] Rally sub-agent could not spawn the nested forked Agents that /orb:drive's cold-fork reviews require — the Agent tool isn't surfaced inside Agent-spawned sub-agents in this harness. Drive sidecar left at stage: review-spec. Resume via /orb:drive 2026-05-24-setup-is-orbit-state-aware in a fresh top-level session.
